case_title: CACH, LLC VS. ROBERT L BROWN ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, ROBERT L AN INDIVIDUAL $1,243.25 PRINCIPAL, $245.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,488.75, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100028753)
